exempt final exams. In other words, if a student is sick and stays home with a doctor's note, that
absence still penalizes them.

[16:00–16:30]

even one day would cost them the exemptions they've worked hard for all semester. This policy

COVID world, that is not only outdated, it's very dangerous. As class president, I've had countless

their exemption? Many choose the latter, which leads to more illness spreading through classrooms,
affecting not only

[17:00–17:30]

adjustment. Absences that are verified by a licensed medical professional, a doctor, should not
count against exemption eligibility. This does not open the door to abuse. It still requires
documentation. It still upholds academic accountability. But it gives students the peace of mind to
prioritize their health.
